title: Helios Shaders
description: Helio Shaders is a lightweight Minecraft shaderpack focused on improved lighting, realistic sun and sky colors, soft atmospheric fog, and enhanced terrain shading.
body: Helio Shaders is a lightweight Minecraft shaderpack focused on improved lighting, realistic sun and sky colors, soft atmospheric fog, and enhanced terrain shading. It keeps performance smooth while giving the world a more cinematic and immersive look without heavy effects like volumetric clouds or advanced water systems.
